_note: v0.3 Item 4: dom_binding::type_for now covers HTMLImageElement (`naturalWidth`, `naturalHeight`) and HTMLMediaElement (`duration`, `seeking`, `ended`, `readyState`) one-way bindings — a 6-name subset of upstream's `oneWayBindingAttributes` table. Each emits `__svn_any_as<Element['prop']>(expr);` in the template-check body. `collect_dom_binding_token_map` post-scan pushes a TokenMapEntry per Range-form binding mapping the overlay expr span to the user's `bind:NAME={expr}` source range, so TS2345 surfaces at the user-visible bind-value position. The HTMLElement layout family (clientWidth/Height, offsetWidth/Height) is deferred — those are commonly used inside {#each} blocks, and the check-emit's top-of-tpl_check position loses block-scope iterator names. Row/column are 0-based.
